docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,712.00 FILED BY ECHOLS INTL. TRAVEL TRAINING COURSES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FINNERTY, LAURA A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FINNERTY, LAURA A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ECHOLS INTL. TRAVEL TRAINING COURSES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FINNERTY, LAURA A. $2,712.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,762.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FINNERTY, LAURA A.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $478.48 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $130.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT FINNERTY, LAURA A.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $478.48 AS TO DEFENDANT FINNERTY, LAURA A.
